message:
bd-3ay7: add validated extension manifest with capability classification

Adds a manifest generator that scans all 205 extension directories,
identifies entry points, extracts capabilities using CompatibilityScanner,
classifies conformance tiers (1-5), and produces VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json.

7 new tests: manifest generation, spot-checks, source tier mapping,
registration extraction, and tier classification logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
